premises.content: Optimally spaced silver grids (2 mm spacing) on the rear ITO electrode reduce resistance loss from 8.6% to less than 0.9% while maintaining bifaciality of 74.3%
premises.label: ag_grid_optimization

premises.content: ALD SnO2 buffer layer greatly reduces perovskite damage during laser scribing and stabilizes the C60/BCP interface by replacing the thermally unstable BCP layer
premises.label: ald_sno2_stability

premises.content: Bifacial minimodules achieve a bifaciality of 74.3% and gain 15% more power output at albedo of 0.2 compared with monofacial modules
premises.label: bifaciality_74

premises.content: Embedding 500 nm SiO2 nanoparticles in perovskite films recovers absorption loss from the absent reflective metal electrode by scattering red and NIR light, increasing Jsc by 0.8 mA cm-2 without introducing additional non-radiative recombination
premises.label: sio2_np_scattering

premises.content: Adding hydrophobic tris(pentafluorophenyl)borane (TPFB) to the PTAA hole transport layer spreads to the perovskite surface and significantly enhances moisture resistance during ALD processing, improving device reproducibility for large-area modules
premises.label: tpfb_moisture_protection
